items.how_used: 使用数值模拟方法，通过程序生成100次随机场景并取平均，计算乘客步行到楼梯的时间分布。

variables.T_i: 第i个乘客步行到楼梯的时间
variables.N(4.396,1.213): 步行速度的正态分布（均值4.396 ft/s，标准差1.213 ft/s）

items.source_excerpt: The numerical approach used a program to procedurally generate scenarios and average them for an accurate result.

items.how_used: 假设步行速度服从正态分布N(1.34,0.37) m/s，并转换为英尺单位用于计算。
items.source_excerpt: Walking speeds follow the normal distribution N(1.34,0.37).

items.how_used: 定义了模型中的基本变量符号，如n（车厢数）、d（车厢长度）、p（站台长度）、h（水平距离）、q（楼梯阶数）、β（楼梯数量）。

formulas.latex_code: n = \text{number of cars to a train}
h_c = \text{horizontal distance between gate } i \text{ and the stairs}

variables.h_c: 第c个门到楼梯的水平距离

formulas.latex_code: q = \text{number of stairs in each staircase}

items.source_excerpt: Both the analytical and numerical models require the definition of some fundamental variables. They are as follows: n=number of cars to a train, d=length of each car, p=platform length, h =horizontal distance between gate i and the stairs, q =number of stairs in each staircase, β =number of stairwells.

items.how_used: 通过改变楼梯数量（1、2、3个）和位置（端点、中间等），分析对总时间和等待时间的影响，得出最优配置。
items.source_excerpt: Both models recommend three configurations that each work best in a different way. If it’s a priority to minimize the overall time, a configuration with three staircases positioned ⅙, ½, and ⅚ of the way along the platform. However, if it’s a priority to minimize the crowding, two staircases at either end of the platform is optimal.

items.how_used: 使用示意图展示站台布局、车门位置和楼梯位置，辅助说明几何距离计算。
列出了7条模型假设，包括车门位置、座位间距、步行速度分布、每门下车人数等，并给出理由。
items.source_excerpt: 3 Assumptions and Justifications • Each train car’s doors split the car into equal parts (thirds). ... • Walking speeds follow the normal distribution N(1.34,0.37). ...

items.how_used: 以平均总时间和平均等待时间作为优化目标，比较不同配置的优劣。
items.source_excerpt: We optimized our configuration by looking at minimizing the average time spent getting to street level, and then minimizing the time spent waiting in line to get to the staircase.

items.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：Introduction（问题描述）、Given Information、Assumptions、Models（含Numerical和Analytical）、Conclusion。
